title: ICAI CA Foundation May 2026 Admit Cards Released!
content:
# ICAI CA Foundation May 2026 Admit Cards Released!

Ek important update hai for all CA Foundation May 2026 aspirants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne aaj, **April 28, 2026** ko, CA Foundation May 2026 exams ke admit cards release kar diye hain. Candidates ab apne hall tickets download kar sakte hain.

Here's what you need to know:

*   **What:** The Admit Cards for the ICAI CA Foundation May 2026 examination have been officially released.
*   **When:** The admit cards were released today, **April 28, 2026**.
*   **How to Download:** Candidates can download their admit cards from the official ICAI e-services portal (SSP) using their registration number and password.
*   **Mandatory Document:** It's crucial to download and take at least two printouts of your admit card. No candidate will be allowed to enter the examination hall without a printed admit card and a valid government-issued identity proof.
*   **Check Details:** Ensure all details on your admit card, like your name, photograph, signature, registration number, roll number, exam centre, and timings, are correct. In case of any discrepancy, contact the ICAI helpdesk immediately.
*   **Exam Dates:** The CA Foundation May 2026 exams are scheduled to begin on May 14, 2026, and conclude on May 20, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://eservices.icai.org)

*Published on: 28 April 2026*
